title: 50 Pcs 20ml Mini Glass Wish Bottles with Cork Stoppers, Tiny Glass Jars with Label Tags and String, Mini Vials for Decoration, Wedding Party, Arts Crafts, Party Favors
features: Glass Bottle Set: Set includes 50pcs 20ml glass bottles with stoppers, 60pcs kraft paper labels and 16 meters of twine for various styles of DIY

Premium Quality Materials: Mini glass bottles with cork stopper are made of high quality glass and natural cork. The cork fits perfectly into the mouth of the bottle, sealing well and keeping the bottle dry. The clear glass makes it easy to see what's inside the bottle, perfect for DIY and art decoration

DIY Art Decoration: Small wishing bottle bottles can be used as hanging decorations, message bottles, storage accessories, etc., can also be used to store aromatherapy products, perfume, spices. Perfect for weddings, parties, Christmas and other festivals and occasions

Ideal for gifts: Put photos, postcards, newspaper clippings, small candies, sand, seashells into small bottles as gifts for your family or friends. Unleash your creativity and turn these small glass bottles into your personalized artwork

Secure Packing: Each set of Mini Glass Wish Bottle is securely packaged in a box with dividers and bubble wrap to prevent breakage in transit. The thickened, high quality glass provides superior impact resistance
description: Product Description You will receive a package with 50 pcs 20 ml mini glass wish bottles,60 pcs tags and about 8m hemp rope. Size: 40mm Height x 16mm Bottom dia，12mm Bottle diam Bottle Capacity: 20 ml Product makings:high quality glass and wooden stopper Perfect for Crafts These decorative bottles are ideal for a variety of uses such as wishing bottles, wedding party and home decorations. Best for beach-themed parties, Valentine's Day gifts or anniversaries with your better half. Perfect for Decoration Fill it with all kinds of things like sand, mini sea shells, mini fish, make your own small glass art, sand art bottles or seashell bottles. Great for DIY They are very small, really cute. It is very suitable for DIY crafts, perfume and essential oil. Write blessings as gifts for family and friends!
